content:
I'll check what the MushTech Studio Reset cron task should do and execute it.MushTech Studio Reset cron task completed (daily at midnight UTC).

Task purpose: Reset core studio workspace directories to their default template state to clean up any accumulated state or changes from the previous day.

Workspaces reset:
- remotion-dev - Reset to default template (no custom files, BOOTSTRAP.md removed)
- video-director - Reset to default template
- video-editor - Reset to default template

All three workspaces now contain only the default OpenClaw workspace structure (AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, HEARTBEAT.md, TOLS.md, IDENTITY.md, USER.md) with no user customizations or project files. This provides a clean slate for each new day's work session.
